title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 9–12, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Nami tries to cut herself off from Luffy’s crew while Zoro and the others see that something is wrong.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If she was really a cold- flooded witch, she wouldn't have covered for me...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: For the sake of my business, this was the only way.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If Nami hadn't done that, I would've been...

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: that octopus dude said he gave Zoro a ride to Cocoyashi Village.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: So the first thing I should do is meet up with him!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong said something about Zoro looking for him as well.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Don't tell me he's charging straight for Arlong park!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Please don't be at Arlong Park, Zoro!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You think Nami really killed long-nose?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Who knows? Maybe after I called her "small-time,"

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: She got so pissed off that she really did kill him.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ahh! Isn't that Zoro right there!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I thought you might've gone to ARL...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Is that all you can think AB...

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
